summary: Phase H2 read path correct: history trimmed from oldest (newest preserved), dual cap enforced, never empty on non-empty input, MessageRepo.last_n scopes shop_id at SQL level and returns [] cross-shop, tests prove old-to-new order deterministically with no LLM dependency, send path untouched, files within (expanded) ALLOWED_FILES.
